children.heading: Definition of section 32
children.label: a Definition of section 32
children.text: In this section, the term “section 32” means ().section 32 of the Act of August 24, 19357 U.S.C. 612c

children.heading: Transfer to Food and Nutrition Service
children.label: b Transfer to Food and Nutrition Service

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Amounts made available for a fiscal year to carry out section 32 in excess of the maximum amount calculated under paragraph (2) shall be transferred to the Secretary, acting through the Administrator of the Food and Nutrition Service, to be used to carry out the Richard B. Russell National School Lunch Act ( et seq.) except section 21 [], and the Child Nutrition Act of 1966 ( et seq.), except sections 17 and 21 [, 1790]”.42 U.S.C. 1751142 U.S.C. 1769b–142 U.S.C. 177142 U.S.C. 1786So in original. Probably should be followed by a comma.1

children.label: i
children.text: in the case of fiscal year 2009, $1,173,000,000;

children.label: ii
children.text: in the case of fiscal year 2010, $1,199,000,000;

children.label: iii
children.text: in the case of fiscal year 2011, $1,215,000,000;

children.label: iv
children.text: in the case of fiscal year 2012, $1,231,000,000;

children.label: v
children.text: in the case of fiscal year 2013, $1,248,000,000;

children.label: vi
children.text: in the case of fiscal year 2014, $1,266,000,000;

children.label: vii
children.text: in the case of fiscal year 2015, $1,284,000,000;

children.label: viii
children.text: in the case of fiscal year 2016, $1,303,000,000;

children.label: ix
children.text: in the case of fiscal year 2017, $1,322,000,000; and

children.label: x
children.text: for fiscal year 2018 and each fiscal year thereafter, the amount made available for the preceding fiscal year, as adjusted to reflect changes for the 12-month period ending on the preceding November 30 in the Consumer Price Index for All Urban Consumers published by the Bureau of Labor Statistics of the Department of Labor; and

children.label: B
children.text: any transfers for the fiscal year from section 32 to the Department of Commerce under the Fish and Wildlife Act of 1956 ( et seq.).16 U.S.C. 742a

children.heading: Fresh fruit and vegetable program
children.label: c Fresh fruit and vegetable program
children.text: Of amounts made available to carry out section 32 under subsection (b)(2)(A), the Secretary shall transfer for use to carry out the fresh fruit and vegetable program under section 19 of the Richard B. Russell National School Lunch Act [] the amounts specified in subsection (i) of that section.42 U.S.C. 1769a

children.heading: Whole grain products
children.label: d Whole grain products
children.text: Of amounts made available to carry out section 32 under subsection (b)(2)(A), the Secretary shall use to carry out $4,000,000 for fiscal year 2009.section 1755a of title 42
the Richard B. Russell National School Lunch Act ( et seq.), except for section 19 of that Act [];42 U.S.C. 175142 U.S.C. 1769a
the Emergency Food Assistance Act of 1983 ( et seq.); and7 U.S.C. 7501
